title: This Open Source Repo Just Solved Claude Code's #1 Problem
summary: Graphify is an open source repository that addresses memory constraints in Claude Code by creating knowledge graphs from code bases instead of using RAG. It generates more accurate, token-efficient responses by extracting and structuring code information without needing full context retrieval.
